title: HSDS Eye Balm
description: B站著名UP主黑山大叔的護眼材質包。An eye-friendly resource pack crafted by HSDS, a popular Bilibili content creator.
body:
- 202604更新
原來大叔有更新了，之後這邊就不再搬運了。
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/protect-my-eyes


--------
Bilibili著名UP主黑山大叔製作的護眼材質包，
主要功能是會顯示方塊的邊框，
以方便製作時數數量。
最後會附上他的連結。

Crafted by the famous Bilibili creator HSDS (Hei-Shan-Da-Shu),
this eye-friendly resource pack makes building projects easier by outlining blocks for accurate counting.

Explore his content at:
[黑山大叔主頁](https://space.bilibili.com/19428259?spm_id_from=333.337.search-card.all.click)
